form.formComment: Two-year-old colt by Art Major out of Albuquerque on debut. Won a trial on March 19 at Shepparton over 1690m. The ace draw gives him every chance to kick off with a win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two-year-old colt by Art Major out of Albuquerque on debut. Won a trial on March 19 at Shepparton over 1690m. The ace draw gives him every chance to kick off with a win.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 2nd (Fr4) over 2190m after showing early pace at this track was leading by 7.4 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Priddy Carson (2:44.50) in MAIDEN on March 27 at $7.50. Progressing well. Draws well and is likely to play a major role.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into ninth after being driven well back, behind Meet Me At The Beach at Globe Derby Park over 1800m in a NR up to 43 on March 16 at $41. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing second behind Xlendi Star at this track over 1790m in a MAIDEN on April 7 at $26. Expected to go well again.
